column3: "Valerian promotes relaxation" refers to its ability to help reduce stress and anxiety, contributing to an overall sense of calm.
"Valerian reduces anxiety" refers to its ability to lessen feelings of worry and nervousness using herbal remedies.
"Valerian improves sleep quality" refers to its ability to aid rest by decreasing anxiety and enhancing relaxation during bedtime.
"Valerian reduces muscle tension" refers to its property of easing stiffness and relaxations in muscles.
"Valerian eases pain and inflammation" refers to its ability to relieve discomfort caused by swelling and aches.
"Valerian lowers blood pressure" refers to its ability to reduce hypertension levels in the body.
"Valerian alleviates headaches" refers to its ability to lessen the severity of pain caused by headache through a natural process.
"Valerian enhances mood" refers to its ability to naturally increase positive emotions without side effects.
"Valerian supports digestion" refers to its ability to ease discomfort related to indigestion, such as stomach cramps and gastric upset.
"Valerian boosts immune system" refers to its ability to help strengthen the body's natural defenses against illnesses and infections.
